summary: Added optional best-effort telemetry for Codex CLI execution-time model probe cache activity.
When a telemetryStore is supplied, the runner emits cache miss and cache hit events.
Telemetry includes source, command, cwd, model, and ttlMs context.
Telemetry emission does not block probe execution if the sink fails.
remainingRisk: Telemetry is optional and in-memory test coverage does not prove external sink delivery behavior in a live host session.
next: Thread telemetryStore from the actual desktop/live host execution path into codex-cli-host runs.
Add a user-visible acceptance check that shows cache miss on first modeled run and cache hit on the second.
